inputs.label: Links per Chain
inputs.businessContext: Number of links in one chain (standard Gunter's chain = 100)

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for output rounding

formulas.roundedLinks: roundingMethod === 0 ? Math.round(rawLinks * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : roundingMethod === 1 ? Math.floor(rawLinks * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : Math.ceil(rawLinks * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)
